metadata.title:
TODAY RESULTS
IN STRICT ENFORCEMENT OF
ORDER AGAINST WASHING
TON WATER POWER CON-
PANY BECAUSE OF EXISTING
STRIKE TROUBLE.

pages.raw_text:
The union musicians will not fur
nish band for the children's pic
mic parade tomorrow at Natatorium
park. The orders issued by the
Central Labor Union, forbidding
union music at Natatorium park,
Will be respected by Professor
Kirchner, it was announced today
after conference of labor leaders.
Ordinarily the band plays for the
children, but even should pay be
offered in the present case the
union musicians will not respond,
it is stated.


This action is ire result of the
fight now on between the local
unions and the Washington Water
Power company and these condi.
tions, If local union men are to be
believed, until the fight is ended.


When he learned of the unions
action today, Captain McClelland,
who plans the annual picnic, said
that he intended to make no other
arrangements as he had engaged
the band and had been assured by
Professor Kirchner that there
would be no trouble.
